touchTarget: Option B — nao aplicavel (componente nao interativo)

exceptions.justification: Dark mode divider per Material Design Guidelines. No DSS token provides white with partial alpha. rgba(255,255,255,0.12) is the canonical value for dividers on dark surfaces.
In forced-colors mode, CSS custom properties (var(--dss-*)) are ignored by the browser. An absolute value is required to guarantee the border is visible in Windows High Contrast Mode.

antiPatterns: Using <DssSeparator> inside <DssCard> to separate DssCardSection — DssCard manages its own dividers via CSS (& + &)
Passing dark prop — DSS manages dark mode via [data-theme='dark'] CSS globally
Using arbitrary color strings — only the 5 governed values are supported
